svg.title: AI Medical Coding Platform — Improved Roadmap
svg.desc: Flowchart showing architecture, 5-phase roadmap, and tech stack for an AI medical coding MVP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types should the upload module accept for medical coding?')
sendPrompt('Which OCR tool is best for handwritten medical notes?')
sendPrompt('How should I clean and normalize medical note text before sending to an LLM?')
sendPrompt('What is the best prompt template for extracting ICD-10 and CPT codes from a clinical note?')
sendPrompt('What rules should I put in a medical billing rules engine to prevent coding errors?')
sendPrompt('What should the human review dashboard look like for medical coders?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in the database to build a future RAG system from medical coding data?')
sendPrompt('What should I learn about HIPAA compliance before building a medical AI product?')
sendPrompt('How do I build an OCR + LLM pipeline for medical note coding?')
sendPrompt('What should a medical coder human review dashboard include?')
sendPrompt('How do I measure accuracy of AI medical coding results and improve them?')
sendPrompt('When should I add RAG to my medical coding AI and how do I build it?')
sendPrompt('What HIPAA requirements apply to a medical AI SaaS startup?')
g.text: Add: BAA, encryption, audit logs, access
controls before any patient data touches it.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I handle LLM hallucinations in medical coding to prevent billing errors?')
g.text: Original plan underplays this. LLMs invent
codes. Build hard validation: every code must
exist in official ICD-10 / CPT codebook.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why should I build the rules engine at the same time as the LLM, not after?')
g.text: Original delays it. Build rules alongside the
LLM — catching invalid codes from the first
demo makes the product credible early.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What accuracy metrics should I track for medical coding AI?')
g.text: 3 months is too tight. Budget Month 4 to

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is Next.js with TypeScript the right choice for a medical AI frontend?')
sendPrompt('Why FastAPI for an AI backend and how do I structure it?')
sendPrompt('Should I use PostgreSQL plus pgvector for medical coding data?')
sendPrompt('Compare PaddleOCR vs AWS Textract vs Google Vision for medical documents')
sendPrompt('How do I host a HIPAA-compliant AI application on AWS or Azure?')

svg.text: Medical coding (ICD-10, CPT, modifiers, SOAP notes)
HIPAA basics (PHI, BAA, encryption, audit requirements)
OCR pipeline → FastAPI → Prompt engineering → Validation logic → RAG
